response:
## Implementation of Naive Bayes for Text Classification

### Training Function
The training function processes the corpus by tokenizing each text, removing stop words, and applying stemming. It then calculates the frequency of each word for both classes. Using these frequencies, it computes the prior probabilities for each class and the conditional probabilities of each word given the class.

### Prediction Function
The prediction function takes a new text, preprocesses it in the same way as the training data, and calculates the probability of the text belonging to each class using Bayes’ theorem. It selects the class with the highest probability as the predicted label.

### Evaluation Function
The evaluation function calculates the F1 Score by first determining the true positives, false positives, and false negatives. It then computes precision and recall, and finally combines them into the F1 Score, which provides a balanced measure of the model's performance.

---

### Demonstration with Sample Data

Every cloud has a silver lining.  
Every cloud has a golden lining.  
Every cloud has a white lining.

Every cloud has a silver lining.  
Every cloud has a bright lining.  
Every cloud has a light lining.

Every cloud has a calm lining.  
Every cloud has a soft lining.
